## How verified

<!-- UI changes: attach a screenshot or GIF. Logic changes: which tests / how you ran them. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Added a bullet under `## [Unreleased]` in `CHANGELOG.md` (for any user-facing change)
- [ ] No new permission added (or it's justified above and requested optionally at first use)
- [ ] No telemetry / data sent to the developer; reading stays local
- [ ] Did not edit vendored `src/content/readability.js`
- [ ] Did not bump the version or commit `dist.zip` (releases are tag-driven)
